summary: Verified TDS Management and GST HSN Dashboard features. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified: TDS Dashboard loads at /finance/tds with 4 summary cards and entries table, GST HSN Dashboard loads at /finance/gst-hsn with 5 summary cards and 4 tabs, Party Master shows TDS Configuration section for supplier parties, sidebar navigation shows TDS Management and GST/HSN menu items under Finance.
critical_code_review_comments: TDS Sections API correctly returns 5 pre-seeded sections (194C, 194J, 194H, 194I, 194A) with proper rate structures
194C section has correct threshold (30K per transaction, 100K annual) and different rates for individual (1%) vs company (2%)
194I section correctly handles rent types with 10% for land/building and 2% for plant/machinery
GST HSN Summary API returns proper structure with hsn_summary, state_wise, purchase_vs_sales, date_range, company_state
Missing Data Alerts API correctly identifies 34 alerts for missing HSN codes, GST rates, and customer states
Party Master TDS Configuration section appears when Supplier party type is selected
seed_data_creation: None - TDS sections are pre-seeded on first API call
context_for_next_testing_agent: TDS and GST HSN features fully implemented and working. TDS Dashboard at /finance/tds, GST HSN Dashboard at /finance/gst-hsn. 34 missing data alerts are expected behavior - real data quality issues in database.

features_tested.TDS Sections API (194C, 194J, 194H, 194I: PASS - All 5 sections returned with correct structure
features_tested.TDS Summary API: PASS - Returns financial_year and summary data
features_tested.TDS Entries API: PASS - Returns entries list with status filter support
features_tested.GST Missing Data Alerts API: PASS - Returns 34 alerts with proper structure
features_tested.TDS Dashboard UI: PASS - Title, 4 summary cards, entries table, New Expense button
features_tested.New Expense Dialog: PASS - Opens with TDS calculation preview section
features_tested.GST HSN Dashboard UI: PASS - Title, 5 summary cards, 4 tabs (HSN Summary, State-wise, Purchase vs Sales, Alerts)
features_tested.GST Alerts Tab: PASS - Shows 34 missing data alerts with Fix buttons
features_tested.Party Master TDS Config: PASS - TDS Configuration section appears for supplier parties
features_tested.Sidebar Navigation: PASS - Finance menu with TDS Management and GST/HSN items
